answer:
SE Ranking does not offer a permanent free tier for its API [1]. Instead, you can access a 14-day free trial that includes 100,000 credits to test all API endpoints [2][3][1].

API access is self-serve and available through three models:
1. Pay-as-you-go: One-time credit pack purchases starting at $50 for 250,000 credits [4][5].
2. Subscription Add-on: Monthly credit allowances added to existing SE Ranking plans [4][6].
3. Standalone Plan: Dedicated API access without a web application subscription, starting from approximately $155–$179 per month billed annually [6][1].

You can generate your API key directly via the dashboard to access both Data and Project APIs [4][3].
